to um the platform uh for your uh managers and for your assistant leasing specialists, et cetera.
Anybody who you think needs uh access to the data, we could definitely get them uh a user license.
Now, essentially there are two types of user roles within an apartment IQ.

Uh Typically folks who are um in property management, community managers, we typically see those folks being provisioned as read only users, they're provisioned access to their property, they can see what's happening at their property, pull reports, filter metrics, et cetera.
And then admin users will have the ability to see uh the entire portfolio, be able to uh make changes to comps within the market surveys and then also add users in the future too.
So let's go ahead and jump into the actual platform itself.

So again, just a great way to get a really high level glimpse of your market, be able to see where you're sitting based on various metrics and very easy to share these reports too.
Now, if at any time you have questions about the data, our support team is always here to help.
